site.title: Zefnir Nguyen - Front-end Developer
site.description: I'm Zefnir, a passionate Front-end Developer. I enjoy building websites and web applications that are secure, scalable, and sustainable. My primary tools of choice include: JavaScript, Typescript, React, Next.js, and Node.js.

about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, gaming and reading. An unusual hobby of mine is walking barefoot under the sunlight, it feels like connecting with nature.
